summary: Interactive geographic area reveal map component for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/map-area-reveal/src/MapAreaReveal.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `MapAreaReveal` and `mapAreaRevealDefaultProps`, then register the `MapAreaReveal` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Map Area Reveal Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/map-area-reveal to my project. Preserve the exported MapAreaRevealProps API and register the MapAreaReveal composition with the default props.
